orig_text: Figure 11: UDP Non-Terminal FRAG Option Format
correct_text: Figure 11: UDP Terminal FRAG Option Format
notes: Figure 11 has the wrong caption. It shows the format for terminal fragments and the caption should be corrected as such.

orig_text:
Any options whose length exceeds that of the UDP packet (i.e.,
intending to use data that would have been beyond the surplus area)
SHOULD be silently ignored (again to model legacy behavior).
correct_text:
The procedure for processing options whose length exceeds that of the 
UDP packet (i.e., intending to use data that would have been beyond 
the surplus area) is specified in Section 10.
notes: General, procedures for handling of an invalid length are defined in Section 10 (https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9868.html#section-10-22). The procedure in the final clause of Section 14 was therefore already constrained by the procedure in Section 10, requiring all invalid length options to be silently ignored.
